content.text:
# Warmup: Exploring the Codebase

I'll help you get oriented with a codebase exploration warmup. Let me start by understanding the structure of this workspace.

## Step 1: Check the Working Directory Structure<tool_call>Bash
ARGUMENTS
command: ls -la /workspace</think><tool_call>Bash
ARGUMENTS
command: find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f -name "*.json" -o -name "*.md" -o -name "*.txt" -o -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml" 2>/dev/null | head -20</arg_value></tool_call>
